name: clawitzer
flavor_texts: Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.
By expelling water from the nozzle in the back of its claw, it can move at a speed of 60 knots.
It compresses the water it has sucked up and then projects it with enough power to punch a hole right through a thick sheet of iron.
Its right arm is packed with meat. When its pincer falls off, it’s exported to be used as a cooking ingredient.
After using the feelers on its oversized claw to detect the location of prey, Clawitzer launches a cannonball of water at its target.
Clawitzer’s right arm is a cannon that launches projectiles made of seawater. Shots from a Clawitzer’s cannon arm can sink a tanker.
text: Clawitzer is the Howitzer Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: mega-launcher. Base stats — HP: 71, Attack: 73, Defense: 88, Sp. Atk: 120, Sp. Def: 89, Speed: 59. Evolution line: clauncher → clawitzer. Lore: Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls. By expelling water from the nozzle in the back of its claw, it can move at a speed of 60 knots. It compresses the water it has sucked up and then projects it with enough power to punch a hole right through a thick sheet of iron. Its right arm is packed with meat. When its pincer falls off, it’s exported to be used as a cooking ingredient. After using the feelers on its oversized claw to detect the location of prey, Clawitzer launches a cannonball of water at its target.
